a_image.alt: Steampunk style mood board — Subculture · Victorian Tech

sections.a_eyebrow: Futuristic · Metallic · Vintage Reinterpreted · Aged · Industrial
sections.a_description: Brass gears, leather textures, and the retro-futuristic fantasy of Victorian-era technology imagined through modern eyes — Steampunk design builds digital interfaces that feel like they belong in an inventor's workshop. The dark leather backgrounds, polished brass accents, and elegant Victorian serif typography create spaces where every button could be a mechanical lever and every container a compartment in a mahogany cabinet.

This retro-futuristic style powers steampunk convention sites, alternative fashion brands, cosplay community platforms, and Victorian-inspired game interfaces. You'll see it on watchmaker portfolios, antique shop pages, alternative history novel publishers, and maker community sites — anywhere that celebrates the fantasy of a world where steam power evolved alongside gears, goggles, and beautifully impractical mechanical contraptions.

The brass-and-leather aesthetic of steampunk — Victorian typography, copper mechanical elements, and the retro-futuristic fantasy of steam-powered technology meeting digital design. Background: aged parchment (#f4ead5) — weathered paper from an inventor's workshop. The .inner panel has a dark leather-brown background (#2c1810) with a 1px border (#5a3a20) and 4px border-radius — like a leather-bound journal. A decorative top border (3px solid #b8860b) in dark goldenrod simulates brass trim. Colors: dark goldenrod (#b8860b) as the primary accent — the color of polished brass gears and copper piping. Warm cream (#f4ead5) for headings, muted tan (#a08a6e) for body text. The aesthetic is Victorian-industrial — ornate serifs, metallic accents, and the imagined patina of steam-powered machines. Set in Playfair Display — a transitional serif with high contrast and elegant style that captures the typographic formality of the Victorian era. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #f4ead5. Eyebrow at weight 400, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #b8860b. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #a08a6e. Buttons: primary — goldenrod (#b8860b), dark text (#2c1810), 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, goldenrod border. Alternatives: EB Garamond (classic Victorian), Cinzel (inscriptional).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
